title: Mary, the Holy Mother of God

readings.psalm_response: May God bless us in his mercy.

readings.psalm_response: You will draw water joyfully from the springs of salvation.

readings.psalm_response: Father, into your hands I commend my spirit.

title: Holy Saturday

readings.psalm_response: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad.

title: The Most Holy Trinity

readings.psalm_response: Happy the people the Lord has chosen to be his own.

readings.psalm_response: I will take the cup of salvation, and call on the name of the Lord.

readings.psalm_response: You will draw water joyfully from the springs of salvation.
